programme.desc: Pilgrim lidera la cacería del casi herido a muerte Sunny. La Viuda se enfrenta a sus demonios interiores en un intento de restaurar el Don.

programme.title: Into the Badlands

programme.title: Into the Badlands

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny, la Viuda y Bajie lideran la carga contra Pilgrim, mientras él intenta obtener el control definitivo de los Badlands. M.K. busca vengarse de la Viuda.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: El Clipper más mortífero de los Badlands, Sunny, rescata a un muchacho misterioso, MK, que alberga un oscuro secreto, pero además puede que sepa cómo salir de las Badlands.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: MK encuentra refugio en un lugar inesperado y peligroso, mientras que la lealtad de Sunny se pone a prueba cuando Quinn intenta obligarlo a cometer un acto incalificable.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.desc: Todo lo que empieza tiene un final y el de esta familia no podía dejar de ser el más caótico, aventado, desmadroso y surrealista de toda la televisión.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Lorenzo intenta reconquistar el corazón de Aurora, pero ella le hace una dura confesión sobre Martín. Para vengarse de César, Blanca propaga.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: El pasado y el presente se cruzan constantemente en la vida de Aurora, llevándola a herir los sentimientos de la persona a quien verdaderamente ama. Un agente del FBI aparece para presionar a Elizabeth y Blanca sufre una gran decepción de amor.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Aurora se va para tratar de encontrarse a sí misma pero después decide que quiere vivir el amor de Martín, y todo indica que la manipulación de Elizabeth ha dado resultado. Nina le suplica a Martín que la quiera a ella y jura venganza ante el rechazo.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Ignacio se acerca a Paloma, Cachito le pregunta su nombre y él les miente. Ignacio le pagará a Elmer para que le dé información sobre Paloma. El Chamoy y su hijo se enfrentan. Leonardo le pide a Paloma que se case con él.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Paloma acepta casarse con Leonardo, pero le pide que esperen para dar la noticia. Pedro recibe a Fernanda con una sorpresa, amanecen juntos. Sara le pide a Inés que le permita a Elmer quedarse en la casa, pero Leonardo se opone.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Nora le insinúa a Fabiola que ella le esconde algo a Humberto. Le cuenta a Pedro lo que escuchó de Fabiola e Ignacio. Trencha le cuenta a Basilio que Jonathan ha muerto. Inés habla con Leonardo, sobre darle una oportunidad a Elmer.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Leonardo le cuenta a su familia que están investigando a Elmer, le dice a su hermana que lo vio en la clínica el día que Jonathan murió. Fernanda se entera de que Santiago queda en libertad. El Chamoy entra en la empresa Fuentemayor.

programme.title: Madre Luna
programme.desc: Flavia le entrega la maleta a Tirso, quien la lleva donde los bandidos de la Sierra. Ella le propone a Román que extermine a su enemiga, pero él tiene otros planes con Alejandra y sus hijos.

programme.title: Madre Luna
programme.desc: Flavia le confiesa a Trini que contratará a Garrido para que le haga la vida imposible a Alejandra, pero ella le advierte los peligros. Dulce termina con Ángel luego de verlo con Alejandra.

programme.title: Madre Luna
programme.desc: Flavia cierra el trato con Garrido para que asesine a los Aguirre, pero él pide más que dinero y ella cede. Amenazada por Veneno, Alejandra quiere que sus muchachos se vayan de los Pajonales.

programme.title: Madre Luna
programme.desc: Los bandidos de la sierra llegan a matar a los Aguirre. Valentín cae de un balazo al intentar salvar a Alejandra de Tirso. Leonardo y Ángel intervienen, uno de ellos también resulta herido.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Aurora se va para tratar de encontrarse a sí misma pero después decide que quiere vivir el amor de Martín, y todo indica que la manipulación de Elizabeth ha dado resultado. Nina le suplica a Martín que la quiera a ella y jura venganza ante el rechazo.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Los sueños de Martín se hacen realidad, pero Aurora empieza a confundir las cosas. Inés y Gustavo están muy preocupados cuando es diagnosticada con una enfermedad que afecta su personalidad. Nina y Federico arman un plan contra la reputación de Aurora.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Vanesa no deja pasar la oportunidad de hacer sufrir a Aurora, jugándole una mala pasada a costa de su doble personalidad. Martín le pide a Inés que haga lo posible por reunir a las dos Auroras. Martín renuncia a un sueño, pero no al amor de su vida.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: It sometimes seems the simplest recipes suffer the worst fate in modern cookbooks. The test kitchen was committed to breathing new life into these old-fashioned American recipes: stuffed pork chops, gravy, and glazed carrots.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We offer two inspired takes on roast chicken. Our roast lemon chicken ends with a twist. And there's nothing conventional about cooking a butterflied chicken under a brick. But these two recipes both deliver crisp skin and lots of flavors.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Quick and easy weeknight cooking can still yield great results. We start with two quick-cooking classics— sautéed chicken cutlets and pan-seared shrimp—and elevate them from the everyday.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we offer delicious, relatively straightforward fare that appeals to young and old. What kid—or adult—doesn't look forward to macaroni and cheese or barbecued chicken?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We take some of our favorite restaurant recipes—Crab Towers and Flambéed Pan-Roasted Lobster—and show you how to make them work in a home kitchen.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Huge meaty flavor—combined with spice, smoke, and fire—epitomizes Texas barbecue. Could we figure out how to make authentic Texas beef ribs in our Boston-based test kitchen?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: On occasion, we break the bank and buy a beef tenderloin. The tender, buttery interior is the big draw, and the combination of a healthy dose of seasoning and the flavor from the grill is a perfect solution to an otherwise mild-tasting piece of meat.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we prepare grilled chicken with a sweet-and-sour dipping sauce and grilled salmon with a sweet, sticky glaze.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we prepare chicken enchiladas and Mexican rice.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Sure, raw tomato sauces are fast, but if the sauce is watery and bland, who cares? Likewise, asparagus-based pasta sauces are often bland and boring. In this episode, we keep things simple while avoiding these common problems.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Christie Morrison makes host Julia Collin Davison Slow-Roasted Fresh Ham. Equipment expert Adam Ried reveals his top pick for inexpensive stand mixers. Bryan Roof makes host Bridget Lancaster St. Louis Gooey Butter Cake Bars.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Host Bridget Lancaster makes Popcorn Chicken, & Toni Tipton-Martin talks about the snack's inventor. Equipment expert Adam Ried reviews electric deep-fryers. Bryan Roof makes Gobi Manchurian & Lawman Johnson makes Crispy Vegetable Fritters.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Host Julia Collin Davison makes Green Goddess Roast Chicken, and Toni Tipton-Martin shares the origins of green goddess dressing. Tasting expert Jack Bishop gives a primer on herbs. Ashley Moore makes Potato, Green Bean, and Tomato Salad.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Host Julia Collin Davison makes a Texas favorite, Carne Guisada, and Toni Tipton-Martin shares the origins of the dish. Equipment expert Adam Ried reveals his top pick for oven mitts. Christie Morrison makes Green Chile Chicken Enchiladas.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Host Bridget Lancaster makes One-Pot Chicken Jardinière, and Toni Tipton-Martin shares the history of cooking in one pot. Equipment expert Adam Ried reviews paring knives. Morgan Bolling makes One-Pan Mediterranean Shrimp.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Julia Collin Davison makes Italian Meatloaf. Jack Bishop shares substitutes for fresh garlic, and Morgan Bolling makes Asparagus Baked in Foil. Toni Tipton-Martin tells the immigrant origins of scampi, and Ashley Moore makes Chicken Scampi.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bridget Lancaster makes Crispy Iowa Skinny sandwiches. Adam Ried reviews 12-inch nonstick skillets. Christie Morrison makes Boogaloo Wonderland Sandwiches, & Toni Tipton-Martin shares the its origin. Bryan makes St. Paul Sandwiches.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bridget Lancaster makes Chicken Paprikash and Butter Spaetzle, and Toni Tipton-Martin shares the story of Hungarian immigrants in Cleveland. Adam Ried reviews wooden spoons. Ashley Moore makes weeknight-friendly Ground Beef Stroganoff.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia celebrates with an indoor clambake made with fresh lobster, mussels, and clams, and served with honey cornbread and bistro slaw.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: It's burger night in the Davison house and Julia's got all the fixings: home ground beef, crispy homefries, and her all-time favorite condiment, homemade pickled onions.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia shares her recipe for an easy, one-pan bratwurst dinner with tender kale and potato salad and skillet-roasted pears with caramel sauce for dessert.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia makes tender beef kebabs on the grill with a cherry tomato, arugula and potato salad and summery berry gratins with malted whipped cream

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia makes gas-grilled shrimp skewers with lemon-garlic sauce, a tangy farro salad with white beans and snap peas, plus homemade strawberry frozen yogurt and chocolate shell topping.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia whips up her favorite fried chicken with slow-cooker buttermilk smashed potatoes, and quick collard greens with hot pepper vinegar

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia shares her recipe for easy broiled salmon with mustard and crisp dilled crust, orzo salad with cucumber, red onion, and mint, plus a pretty and pink berry fool for dessert

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia's take on comfort food includes thick-cut pork chops with smoked sea salt, garlic-scented mashed sweet potatoes with coconut milk and cilantro, a brussels sprouts and kale salad with herbs and peanuts, and her slow-cooker nutella bread pudding.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen prepares two Indian favorites: chicken biryani and mulligatawny soup.

programme.title: American Greed

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Darren Berg of Seattle, scams several investors, procuring himself two yachts, a private jet and a lakeside mansion; New York socialite Dina Wein Reis executes a grey market selling scam.

programme.title: Lockup Special Investigation
programme.desc: For some kids, the revolving door of lockup seems to snag one generation after the next; 17-year-old Kenneth and 14-year-old Kentrell, have 10 brothers and sisters, a father in prison and a mother with a criminal record for public nuisance.

programme.title: Lockup Special Investigation
programme.desc: Figuring out what contributes to kids getting locked up is not an exact science; over the past six years, Aaron has become a familiar face at Lake County Juvenile; with his 18th birthday just days away, he finds himself back behind bars.

programme.title: Lockup Special Investigation
programme.desc: Juvenile Court Judge Mary Beth Bonaventura observes that an indicator of what will happen in a child's life can be found by looking at the family and how supportive it has been; the kids seem to know this, too.

programme.title: Lockup Special Investigation
programme.desc: More than three thousand kids pass through the juvenile courts in Lake County, Indiana each year; here, consequences can range from a sleepless night in detention to the ultimate punishment for kids who keep coming back: Boys' School.

programme.title: Lockup Special Investigation
programme.desc: Ricky has spent a total of 266 days in Lake County, and another 16 months at a residential placement facility in Nevada; when he didn't return to his placement in Nevada after a weekend home pass, Ricky was picked up on a bench warrant.

programme.title: Lockup: Pendleton: Extended Stay
programme.desc: The inmates at Indiana's Pendleton Juvenile Correctional Facility aren't sentenced in terms of years; they get out when they achieve certain goals, no matter how long that takes.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A former Army intelligence officer steals millions through a fake veterans' charity.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A phony psychic scams a wealthy but lonely timber baron out of millions while her devious daughter pretends to be in love with him.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Police Lt. Joe Gliniewicz steals from a youth group and his death in the woods in Fox Lake, Ill., sparks a massive manhunt to find his killers.

programme.title: Lockup: Tampa: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A drug-addicted mother asks a judge to keep her out of prison; just brought in on drug charges, a young man attempts to make bail, while another awaits sentencing for an unthinkable crime.

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp splurges on an expensive French sunburst clock, and a Victorian scent bottle has her swooning. But former soldier Raj Bisram finds ammunition boxes and a steel helmet a lot more attractive.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Raj Bisram continue their rally through East Anglia in the 1960s Sunbeam Rapier. Raj does a spot of 'step dancing' in a local pub, while Natasha buys a jukebox from the 1800s.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In Kent, Raj Bisram nabs a post-Napoleonic French eagle, but cherubs and art deco costume jewelry are more Natasha Raskin Sharp's style. Which of them will clean up at the Colchester sale?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In Norfolk, Raj Bisram stops off at one of Britain's first nature reserves, and Natasha Raskin Sharp falls for a kitten, an owl, and takes a punt on a pair of polo horses.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: For their last auction in Cambridge, there's a seventies theme going on as Raj Bisram weighs in with a large set of standing scales and Natasha Raskin Sharp shells out for a lazy Susan.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: A brand new Road Trip pairing in a 1960's classic car. Auctioneer Natasha Raskin Sharp and dealer Margie Cooper do the west of Scotland. Expect treasure hunting and curry eating.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Margie Cooper and Natasha Raskin Sharp hit the antique shops of Scotland to uncover an unusual pyjama case and a rare piece of Victoriana. Both hoping for big profits at auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.desc: It's hard to believe, but in America alone, there may be as many as 5,000 religious groups preying upon the weak and vulnerable, and all in the name of God. Dr. Phil's guests have warnings for you and your children.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: They smoke, drink, speed, pop pills, disappear all night and disrespect their parents all day. They are teens gone wild and Dr. Phil has a wake-up call for them and their parents. Parents, if you're in power struggles with your teen, don't miss this show!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Nancy, who adamantly denies her online love relationship with "Shaun" is a scam. Nancy and her son Darcy speak face-to-face for the first time in over a year. Plus updates from past catfished guests!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When you and your beloved say "I do," it's "for better or worse." But what happens when all you feel is the "worse" part and wind up trapped in a bad marriage?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kim & ex-husband, Ryan, are terrified of son, Rylan, 7, who has a fascination with knives, talks to an imaginary friend named "Bleeder", and has sent two teachers to the hospital. What might be causing Rylan's aggressive behavior?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: At 700 lbs., Pauline, 48, has a Guinness World Record title of Heaviest Living Woman. Pauline is also a mother, daughter & friend with hopes and dreams of a better life for herself & her 18-year-old son Dillon. Can Dr. Phil help get her life on track?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval

programme.title: Bachelorette Weekend
programme.desc: The crew scrambles to find a last-minute party after a cancellation, leading to a weekend of juice cleanses, Botox, an angry policeman and a surprising reveal from Robbie.

programme.title: Bachelorette Weekend

programme.desc: Birthday diva Liz forces the office to go all out, Rachal makes a painful decision, and Robbie pursues a new investor as the company plans a multiparty ultimate weekend.

programme.desc: Liz fears for her job after she overhears Robbie talking to an investor, and the crew plans a competitive bachelor party for a former magician and his groomsmen.

programme.desc: Rachyl puts her dreams of becoming a lawyer on hold to support her husband, Kerry, in chasing after his goal of being a country musician in Nashville.

programme.desc: Jackson has to decide if he's ready for a serious relationship with Jessica, or if pageant girl Savana is more his speed. Rachyl struggles to tell Kerry about a recent text exchange with an Ex who just moved back to Nashville.

programme.title: Music City
programme.desc: Jackson might be biting off more than he can chew when he decides to perform live, and Kerry progresses his music career when he connects with another singer.

programme.title: Music City

programme.title: Music City

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/07/15. Bourdain explores the beauty, culture, and food of Budapest, where he samples goulash, fisherman's soup, blood sausage, and chicken liver.

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Aired 09/25/2016. Lisa Ling gains unprecedented access to the Los Angeles County Jail to understand what it takes to manage the country’s busiest jail.

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling
programme.desc: Aired 10/02/2016. Join Lisa Ling as she steps into the cage with three female fighters who are turning the sport of mixed martial arts on its head.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 2/14/2021. Stanley Tucci feasts on pizza in Naples. Stanley embarks on a whirlwind tour to find the freshest mozzarella and the best San Marzano tomatoes, and enjoys a spectacular spaghetti and zucchini.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 2/21/2021. Stanley Tucci heads to Rome in search of the famous Four Pastas. Stanley orders rigatoni all’amatriciana, samples carbonara and tries a selection of cheeses and sausages made from the sheep and pigs farmed in the region.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 2/28/2021. Stanley Tucci explores Bologna, seen by many as the food capital of Italy. The region of Emilia-Romagna is home to globally renowned protected food products: parmigiano, prosciutto de Parma and traditional balsamic vinegar to name a few.

programme.title: Tricky Dick
programme.desc: Aired 03/17/2019. Raised by a family with modest means in a childhood beset by tragedy, Nixon learned early to recognize opportunity where he could and how to seize it.

programme.title: Tricky Dick
programme.desc: Aired 03/24/2019. In a devastating defeat, Nixon lost one of the closest presidential elections in US history to JFK. In 1968, Nixon sensed an opportunity for a comeback.

programme.title: Tricky Dick
programme.desc: Aired 04/07/2019. After a great political comeback, Nixon realized his survival hinged on a key promise: to end the Vietnam War. The president suspects a conspiracy against him.

programme.title: Tricky Dick
programme.desc: Aired 04/14/2019. Nixon was re-elected in a landslide, but shortly into his second term, the cover-up of a DNC Headquarters break-in at the Watergate complex began to fall apart.

programme.desc: Meth and alcohol cloud the tragic accusations between husband and wife. A man learns why you should report if you recover your stolen vehicle. A woman says heroin is the only thing that can heal her.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers capture a suspected burglar, a felon, and his girlfriend are taken into custody after a standoff with police, and a man is arrested for possession of a stolen moped.

programme.desc: Recovery of a stolen vehicle uncovers a weapon and a lengthy criminal history. Detectives cross paths with a car that was stolen in a carjacking. Officers speak with a man who has questionable standards regarding gun safety.

programme.desc: An officer coordinates a reverse-prostitution sting designed to capture suspects who solicit prostitutes. An inebriated man is detained until he sobers up. Officers stop a vehicle which was reported stolen.

programme.desc: A man and woman are pulled over while out on a candy run. A simple traffic violation turns into a multi-vehicle police pursuit. Deputies are notified of a stolen car and find the driver in possession of an interesting tool.

programme.desc: Deputies respond to an armed carjacking, an altercation leads to a woman's arrest, and officers face a combative man.

programme.desc: It’s all deputies and dogs on deck in an attempt to subdue a man in distress. A suspect proves to be too sleepy to engage in truck thievery. A baby is rescued in a car with no air conditioning.

programme.desc: A suspect from Sara's past returns, causing her to question her future as a CSI.

programme.desc: Hodges has ulterior motives when he stages hypothetical murders in the lab to give his colleagues a chance to play CSI.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team battle the flu when they are called upon by DDA Klein to investigate the deaths of several key witnesses for a grand jury case against a dangerous Las Vegas gang.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The disturbing death of a 3-year-old girl has a great impact on Catherine as she searches for clues to her murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass and Nick get help from an unlikely source, an incarcerated criminal (Method Man), when investigating two murders that take place in the same apartment building.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team discover several victims who have green blood, leading them to the conclusion that their deaths are somehow connected.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el asesinato de toda una familia, excepto el de una hija que supuestamente está poseída por el diablo.

programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo descubren a un joven estrangulado hasta morir ahorcado ...cuyo cuerpo parece el de una mujer.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Woody lets Ma Clavin move into Woody's apartment, much to Cliff's chagrin.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm fights to save his favorite hangout from getting demolished.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca plans a surprise visit to her prison bound love, Robin.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: In this very special celebration of "Cheers"' 200th show, Shelley Long rejoins the rest of the gang for a unique look back at the past eight years in part one of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: In this very special celebration of "Cheers"' 200th show, Shelley Long rejoins the rest of the gang for a unique look back at the past eight years in part two of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Capulina contra Los Vampiros
programme.desc: Vampiros agresivos amenazan a Capulina hasta que el encuentra la manera de arrancarles los colmillos con unas pinzas de dentista. Los vampiros chimuelos se vuelven dóciles y beben leche en lugar de sangre.

programme.title: Capulina Speedy Gonzalez
programme.desc: En el Oeste, el cartero Speedy sólo lleva una carta de su novia Rosita para él mismo. Un cocinero que castiga a los que no aprueban sus platillos sin picante lo obliga a comer chile. Al comerlo se vuelve rápido y valiente.

programme.title: Escuela de verano (LAS)
programme.desc: Dos mujeres fundan una escuela de verano para jóvenes del continente, pero el consejero les roba el dinero.

programme.title: Las coronelas
programme.desc: Un general obsesionado con su huella en la historia va de pueblo en pueblo exigiendo el pago de sus servicios. Un hombre no puede pagarle y ofrece a sus dos hijos a cambio. Pero, peripecias aguardan, ya que los dos bebés varones son en realidad niñas.

programme.title: Las fuerzas vivas
programme.desc: En un pueblo aislado se recibe la noticia de que ha estallado la revolución. Los dos partidos políticos que regentan la ciudad aprovechen para hacer campaña en favor de sus intereses.

programme.title: Puños de roca
programme.desc: Los comanches quieren aliarse con los sioux para apoderarse de un territorio que ha explorado un militar mexicano.

programme.title: Las coronelas
programme.desc: Un general obsesionado con su huella en la historia va de pueblo en pueblo exigiendo el pago de sus servicios. Un hombre no puede pagarle y ofrece a sus dos hijos a cambio. Pero, peripecias aguardan, ya que los dos bebés varones son en realidad niñas.

programme.title: Pecado de juventud
programme.desc: Una sirvienta embarazada del joven de la casa donde trabaja es despedida de su trabajo y un vecino abogado le ofrece su ayuda para hacer que el joven se comprometa con ella, o al menos darle una ayuda para criar a su hijo.

programme.title: Amistad
programme.desc: “Amistad” es la historia de un motín en 1839 a bordo de un barco de esclavos que viaja a la costa noroeste de Estados Unidos. Gran parte de la historia tiene que ver con un drama judicial sobre el esclavo que lideró la rebelión.

programme.title: Crepúsculo
programme.desc: Le leyenda del cine, Paul Newman encabeza un electo luminoso en esta aclamada intriga llena de estrellas y suspenso.

programme.title: Encima de la hora
programme.desc: Gene llega a su casa después de asistir al funeral de su exesposa. Al poco tiempo, secuestran a su hija. Recibe una pistola y la tarea de matar a una persona en una hora y quince minutos. De lo contrario, su hija será asesinada.

programme.title: Sin salida
programme.desc: Un encubrimiento y una caza de brujas ocurren después de que un político mata accidentalmente a su amante. Kevin Costner y Gene Hackman protagonizan esta tensa historia de suspenso político.

programme.title: Los Intocables
programme.desc: El clásico enfrentamiento entre el bien y el mal, con Kevin Costner como el agente federal Eliot Ness, Robert De Niro como el jefe mafioso Al Capone y Sean Connery como Malone.

programme.title: De carne y hueso
programme.desc: Una figura del pasado despierta un recuerdo profundo y oscuro, como una historia familiar escrita a sangre fría.

programme.title: Un asesino anda suelto
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie está suelto y ha secuestrado al hijo de un agente del FBI que lo persigue. Pero, ¿quién es el asesino? Una historia llena de emociones y sorpresas.

programme.title: La Mexicana
programme.desc: Un hombre trata de llevar a través de la frontera una antigua pistola llamada La Mexicana, que se cree que está maldita, mientras su novia lo presiona para que abandone sus costumbres criminales.

programme.title: Showgirls: lo prohibido
programme.desc: Conflictos de seducción, pasión y poder se revelan cuando los creadores de 'Instinto Básico' destapan el aparentemente glamoroso mundo del espectáculo en Las Vegas con esta controvertida película protagonizada por Elizabeth Berkley.

programme.title: La mejor Navidad
programme.desc: Gloria, enfocada en su trabajo en Miami después de su divorcio, envía a sus hijos a pasar la Navidad con su exmarido en Jalisco. Lo que no imaginan es que esta decisión les va a cambiar la vida.

programme.title: Las estafadoras
programme.desc: Una mujer y su hija son estafadoras profesionales que utilizan sus armas de seducción para engañar a millonarios, hasta que la joven hija se enamora poniendo en apuros el último golpe: un excéntrico magnate del tabaco.

programme.title: Que linda adivina
programme.desc: Cuando el carnicero Leo regresa de un viaje de pesca, no puede esperar para mostrar su "presa": su bella esposa, una clarividente llamada Marina. Pronto se entera de una psíquica que transforma a los curtidos habitantes de la ciudad en niños enamorados.

programme.title: El último beso
programme.desc: El último beso es una película de drama y comedia sobre la vida, el amor, la infidelidad, el perdón, el matrimonio y la amistad... y la aceptación de cumplir 30.

programme.title: Con Locura
programme.desc: Una universitaria británica se enamora de un estudiante estadounidense, del que debe separarse al ser expulsada del país por el vencimiento de su permiso.

programme.title: Sangre por sangre
programme.desc: El oficial John Kang sueña con una vida tranquila con su esposa e hija. Pero después de una operación fallida, su mundo se torna violento tras volverse el blanco de un posible asesinato a manos de un implacable jefe militar camboyano.

programme.title: Ultimo cuerpo
programme.desc: El asesinato de un travesti despierta en el periodista Heriberto Camargo una sed de verdad. En su investigación, descubre que no es un delito aislado sino parte de una serie de asesinatos brutales de agentes de policía.

programme.title: La máquina asesina
programme.desc: Un asesino entrenado en la Unión Soviética está decidido a escapar de su doble vida de asesino a sueldo y padre.

programme.title: The Crow ES
programme.desc: Esta exitosa película visualmente imponente y llena de acción, basada en la serie de cómics, sigue el regreso de la tumba de un joven guitarrista roquero que, junto a su prometida, son asesinados brutalmente por una pandilla de criminales.

programme.title: El cuervo 2: Ciudad de Ángeles
programme.desc: Esta secuela veloz y llena de acción de "El cuervo" sigue el ascenso de la víctima de asesinato Ashe Corven, que regresa a la vida gracias a un misterioso cuervo. Con la ayuda de una mujer llamada Sarah, se venga de sus asesinos uno por uno.

programme.title: Perdido en la fama
programme.desc: Un rockero semi retirado y caprichoso (Antonio Banderas) debe espabilarse para rescatar a su esposa, quien ha sido secuestrada mientras se encontraba de vacaciones en Chile.

programme.title: Actos de venganza
programme.desc: Un abogado de hablar rápido (Antonio Banderas) transforma su cuerpo y toma un voto de silencio, que no se romperá hasta que descubra quién mató a su esposa e hija y tenga su venganza.

programme.title: El gringo
programme.desc: "El hombre" cruza a México con $2,000,000 en efectivo y un plan para vivir lo que le queda en la playa, pero se queda atrapado en el pueblo "El Fronteras". Bajo ataque de policías corruptos, debe salvar "El Fronteras" a través de espectaculares tiroteos.

programme.title: Después de Lucía.
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de su esposa, Roberto se muda a la Ciudad de México con su hija, Alejandra. Ella se vuelve objeto de acoso cuando surge un video en el cual Alejandra tiene relaciones con un compañero.

programme.title: La luz incidente
programme.desc: Una mujer joven que tiene problemas al criar a sus hijas gemelas después de que su marido y su hermano mueren, acepta el cortejo de un pretendiente encantador pero misterioso, mayor que ella.

programme.title: El cuento de las comadrejas
programme.desc: Una actriz de la era dorada del cine argentino comparte una mansión en decadencia con tres hombres: su esposo, un guionista y un director con los que solía trabajar. Pero la llegada de dos jóvenes y la posible venta de la mansión lo cambian todo.

programme.title: Plantados
programme.desc: Cuando Ramón descubre a Mauricio, uno de los guías carcelarios más crueles que recuerda cuando fue encarcelado en Cuba y ahora vive en Florida, empieza a recordar algunos casos traumáticos vividos con su torturador.

programme.title: Canela
programme.desc: La dueña del restaurante, Tere, ha caído en un estado de depresión tras la trágica muerte de su hija.

programme.title: Ladrón que roba ladrón
programme.desc: A un par de ladrones profesionales se les complica su plan para robar a un millonario, después de que los mejores miembros de su equipo habitual, abandonan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Ladrones

programme.title: Mimic 2
programme.desc: Una mutación de cucarachas asesinas sorprende a la ciudad de Nueva York. Se crean imitaciones para infiltrar su grupo y acabar con ellas, pero estas evolucionan y se transforman en seres humanos para seguir acabando con la humanidad.

programme.title: Mimic 3: sentinel
programme.desc: Los bichos están de regreso en la tercera parte de Mimic. Después de que un grupo de personas comienzan a desaparecer, un hombre hipersensible a los gérmenes y confinado a una burbuja protectora pretende ser detective y descifrar el fenómeno.

programme.title: Leprechaun
programme.desc: Jennifer Aniston hizo su debut en el cine en esta historia de terror acerca de un duende psicótico de seis siglos de antigüedad en una ola de asesinatos a través de Dakota del Norte.

programme.title: Especies
programme.desc: Un experimento genético genera a una hermosa mujer mutante que amenaza a la raza humana.

programme.title: Estación zombi

programme.title: Resucitados
programme.desc: Un grupo de investigadores médicos descubren una manera de revivir a los pacientes muertos.

programme.title: Pulse
programme.desc: Cuando su amigo hacker accidentalmente canaliza una misteriosa señal inalámbrica, un grupo de estudiantes se reúnen para detener a un terrible mal que se apodera del mundo.

programme.title: Beavis y Butt-head, la película

programme.title: Querido Dios

programme.desc: Legends Kirk Douglas, Tony Curtis, Ernest Borgnine and Janet Leigh dazzle in this epic chronicle of brutal rivalry and bloodthirsty ambition as two brothers are locked in a battle that will decide their fate...and that of a beautiful princess.

programme.desc: The day has come that Mike and Gloria are moving into their new home and Archie is practically pushing them out the door. Archie is being so obnoxious that Mike finally reaches a boiling point until he declares his independence and calls Archie a fathead.

programme.desc: Vivian's pleasure at Arthur's sudden burst of amorous behavior is overcome by panic when it becomes obvious that Arthur is just not himself.

programme.title: Maude

programme.desc: To understand each other better, Felix and Oscar reverse their roles -- Felix turning to a slob and Oscar becoming a fussbudget.

programme.desc: Hooterville residents, taking over operation of the Cannonball, demand so many changes that the train's crew decides to quit.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: The killing of a woman in a VA goes unsolved for a quarter of a century before investigators are finally able to zero in on the likely killer. And, in 1999 detectives test the blood evidence and develop a DNA profile of a shooting death from 1980.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: In Wisconsin, advances in forensic clay modeling help investigators identify a murder victim whose skin was stripped from her head, neck, and legs. And in California, police track down two boys who enjoy satanic rituals and setting fires.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A police investigator discovers a letter written 16 years earlier that provides clues to a woman's murder. And a firearms expert supplies the evidence that South Carolina authorities need to put a man on trial in 2002 for a murder committed in 1961.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In July of 1970, the brutal murder of single mom Loretta Jones leaves four-year-old Heidi motherless. Nearly 40 years later, she vows to solve her mother's cold case.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: The murder of an Ohio woman in 1974 is solved more than 20 years later after police get a crucial clue--the woman's husband was seen building a coffin-shaped box about the time the woman disappeared.

programme.desc: El cuerpo descompuesto de una mujer joven fue descubierto en un canal de irrigación de Bakersfield. Si había rastros de evidencia, se había lavado con el agua.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante seis años, un asesino en serie merodeó por las calles de la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una hermosa joven cayó a su muerte desde un acantilado con vistas al océano. Inicialmente, los investigadores pensaron que se trataba de un trágico accidente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2007, Brian y Beverly Mauck fueron encontrados muertos en su casa en Graham Washington. Usando una huella de la palma de una mano y de un zapato en la escena del crimen, los investigadores enfocan su atención en Daniel Tavares, quien había tatuado la espalda de Brian.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1988, se descubrió el cuerpo de una mujer joven en un río de Ohio. La mayor parte de la evidencia había sido borrada, pero el hijo de 6 años de la víctima, sin saberlo, les dijo a los investigadores todo lo que necesitaban saber.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cabecera
programme.desc: Cuando los cazadores encontraron un cráneo en un cañón de Texas, la policía encontró trozos de ropa, huesos pequeños y un mechón de cabello.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un profesor de gimnasia de secundaria abandona misteriosamente la ciudad sin despedirse de nadie.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Camino fatal
programme.desc: Un patrullero de carreteras fue enviado a lo que pensó que sería un accidente de tráfico de rutina hasta que miró en el automóvil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asistente del gerente de una carnicería de Florida es apuñalado hasta la muerte. Parece ser un robo que salió mal, pero una huella sangrienta revela que él conocía a su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2002, una pequeña comunidad en el norte del estado de Nueva York quedó devastada cuando Patty Wlasiuk murió en un accidente de camión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Viktorioso
programme.desc: Tres homicidios en dos continentes parecían ejecuciones profesionales. Los investigadores de ambos lados del Atlántico necesitaban averiguar si estaban relacionados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de doce años reclama que ha sido secuestrada y abusada sexualmente. Ella contó lo que había pasado con voz calma, sin alteraciones ni emociones, lo que hizo difícil que la policía le creyera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mujer estaba muerta. Al hombre le habían disparado cuatro veces pero sobrevivió.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una modelo aspirante apareció muerta y el sospechoso principal fue su novio. Cuando finalmente se le dio el visto bueno, los investigadores tuvieron que buscar más profundamente para poder encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Rompiendo el Molde
programme.desc: El hijo de tres años de unos padres de Dripping Springs, Texas, desarrolla una condición respiratoria.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mujer había sido agredida sexualmente, apuñalada repetidamente y dada por muerta.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Poco después del amanecer, se inicia un incendio en un contenedor de basura en Vancouver. Nadie ve al pirómano ni el fuego, que arde durante horas en el estacionamiento desolado. Pero hay más que basura en este contenedor en llamas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A cenar y ver una película
programme.desc: La hora de la muerte se vuelve fundamental después de que se encuentra asesinada a una mujer embarazada en su habitación con aire acondicionado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2006, Kathy Augustine, una política de Nevada, murió misteriosamente durante una campaña de reelección. El médico forense no pudo aislar la causa de la muerte ni explicar las pequeñas heridas punzantes descubiertas durante la autopsia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1989, April Loveless, de 4 años, fue encontrada muerta en el patio trasero de su casa en Texas. Sus padres le dijeron a la policía que fue atacada y asesinada por perros salvajes. Los investigadores no estuvieron de acuerdo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Raspando la Superficie
programme.desc: Los científicos forenses trabajan con la única pista recuperada de un tiroteo con múltiples víctimas: una escopeta de calibre 12. Los científicos utilizan métodos únicos para extraer el número de serie del arma y rastrearlo hasta su propietario.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Robert Sims regresa a casa después de trabajar en el turno de noche y encuentra a su esposa inconsciente en el piso de la cocina. Su hijo está profundamente dormido en una habitación de arriba, pero su hija de seis semanas, Heather, no está.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un niño de quince años muere a causa de una misteriosa herida de bala en la cabeza mientras está sentado en el vestíbulo del club de armas de su padre.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With the field narrowed down to 119 women, the pressure is on. They must quickly learn a power pom routine and the famous kickline in order to perform it an hour later before the judges.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 44 women begin the very first training camp at the new 1 billion dollar Cowboys' facility, The Star. At the First Meeting, Kelli lays down the law and makes it clear that eight women will be sent home this summer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts' journey continues into Asia in a quest to find out how early hunter-gatherers survived in the inhospitable Arctic region of Northern Siberia. Alice meets the nomadic Evenki people.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Göbeklitepe ruins discovered in Turkey's history goes back 12,000 years. How and in what way did the descendants of the Neanderthals, the Aztecs of Europe, disappear with the arrival of Homo sapiens?

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts looks at our ancestors' seemingly impossible journey to Australia. Miraculously preserved footprints and very old human fossils buried in the outback suggest a mystery: that humans reached Australia almost before anywhere else.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: How did Stone Age people reach North and South America? Dr Alice Roberts discovers evidence for an ancient corridor through the Canadian ice sheet that may have allowed those first people through.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to `own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Bird expert Bill Oddie helps construct amazing, life-sized, bio-mechanical replicas as he presents an imaginary battle between a tyrannosaurus rex and a triceratops.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Here, Bill Oddie asks whether the Velociraptor was really the monstrous predator of popular legend.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: America was once home to such fierce predators as the giant short-faced bear and the saber-toothed tiger.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: In Australia 65,000 years ago, the first human explorers face a land populated with giant lizards, killer rhino-like creatures and deadly birds.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Aztecs
programme.desc: Barbara's interference in the Aztec practice of human sacrifice casts doubt over her supposed divinity and puts the whole crew in jeopardy. Meanwhile, Ian faces a challenge.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Aztecs
programme.desc: Barbara's divine powers are challenged and she humiliates Tlotoxl, the Hight Priest of Sacrifice, who determines to prove her mortality. Meanwhile, the Doctor becomes romantically involved.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Aztecs
programme.desc: It is the day of the solar eclipse when Susan is to be punished for her refusal to marry. Can the Doctor and his companions escape before they are sacrificed to the Sun God?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Planet of Giants
programme.desc: The crew arrive in a place where everything is on a giant scale, the result of the TARDIS doors malfunctioning. They are soon made acutely aware of the nefarious plans of a ruthless businessman and his misguided scientist.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Planet of Giants
programme.desc: The Doctor realises that the government scientist, Farrow, has been murdered while Barbara inadvertently comes into contact with the poisonous strain of insecticide.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Planet of Giants
programme.desc: The Doctor and Susan are reunited with Ian and Barbara. As Barbara's health rapidly deteriorates, the crew find the formula for DN6, the pesticide that Forrester was prepared to kill for, and which could now be responsible for killing Barbara.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Dalek Invasion
programme.desc: The Doctor and his companions arrive in a London very different from what they remember.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Dalek Invasion
programme.desc: The Doctor and Ian are captured and taken to the Dalek ship.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Dalek Invasion
programme.desc: Hiding on board the Dalek spaceship, Ian is taken to the mines of Bedfordshire.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Dalek Invasion
programme.desc: The Doctor, Susan and David discover a nearby firebomb, left by Robomen to destroy London.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Dalek Invasion
programme.desc: Ian and his friend Larry are chased by the Slyther, protecting the Bedfordshire mines.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Dalek Invasion
programme.desc: Barbara realises how to control the Robomen and orders an attack on the Daleks.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Romans
programme.desc: After relaxing at a Roman villa the Doctor is mistaken for a murdered lyre player and targeted by an assassin. Meanwhile, Ian and Barbara are captured by slave traders.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Romans
programme.desc: Barbara is sold as a slave and Ian is to be trained as a gladiator. The Doctor and Vicki arrive at the Emperor’s court with the Doctor still masquerading as Maximus Pettulian.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Romans
programme.desc: Poppaea plans to poison Barbara who has become the object of Nero’s affections. The Doctor is to be thrown to the lions, Ian and Delos are set against each other in the arena.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Romans
programme.desc: Inspired by the Doctor, Nero sets Rome ablaze. Ian must fight his way out of the arena and rescue Barbara. The Doctor and Vicki hurry to flee the city and escape to the TARDIS.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Web Planet
programme.desc: The TARDIS lands on a planet that affects its systems. The Doctor and his companions must save the ship, while assisting an oppressed alien race to regain control of their world.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Web Planet
programme.desc: The Doctor, Ian and Vicki have been captured by the Zarbi and taken into a control centre.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Web Planet
programme.desc: Ian and the Menoptra Vrestin try to escape the pursuing Zarbi but the ground gives way beneath them what will the Zarbi do next?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Web Planet
programme.desc: Barbara and Prapillus are caught in the middle of fighting between the menoptra and the Zarbi they find themselves surrounded, how will they escape?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Web Planet
programme.desc: Returning to the Carsenome with the Menoptra's isop-tope device, the Doctor and Vicki are herded into a chamber where they are enveloped in a web-like substance, what next for the Doctor.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Web Planet
programme.desc: The TARDIS dematerialises from the surface of Vortis. Prapillus vows that the Earth people will never be forgotten and warns that the Animus must never again be allowed to take root on the planet.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Space Museum
programme.desc: The Doctor and his companions arrive on a planet which houses an all but forgotten museum. While touring it, they are horrified to discover that they themselves are exhibits in one of the cases. Can they avoid becoming just an exhibit in the space museum?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Space Museum
programme.desc: As the Doctor and his companions move through the museum's vast labyrinth of corridors, the enslaved Xeron race sense an opportunity to topple their Morok invaders.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Space Museum
programme.desc: With the Doctor held captive by the Commander Lobos and destined to become an exhibit in the space museum, his companions are left to do whatever they can to break the chain of events.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Space Museum
programme.desc: Ian confronts Lobos and orders him to revive the Doctor as the Xerons' revolution begins to gather pace. But when the four time-travellers are re-captured, will the Doctor's prediction of a future as museum exhibits finally be realised?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The bounty-hunter adventures of Duane "Dog" Chapman and his Posse are chronicled in this one hour "Best Of" special, featuring superlative memorable moments from the previous seven seasons.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog launches a high stake hunt through the desolate and dangerous mountain landscape of western Colorado in pursuit of a gun-loving survivalist with a million dollar bond on his head. Will Dog's plan of using brains over brawn work?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Once in Montrose, Dog discovers that the million dollar fugitive is not the young bondsman's only problem. Dog and Beth make it their mission to both clean up the mess and teach him the fundamentals of bondsmanship.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is committed to saving his new friend's bail bonding business, and now must race against time to bring a rogues' gallery to justice in the High Sierra mountain town of Montrose, CO.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With four outlaws still on the lam, Dog sets out to bring 'em in. As day turns into night and with the darkness and the danger mounting, an undaunted Dog and team plan late night hits on the riskiest of locations--their targets' homes.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With a long record of violence and abuse and weighing in at over 200lbs, Dog's target for the day does not sound like a gentle giant. When the trail grows cold, Dog turns up the heat on the fugitive's brother and sister.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Friend of the family, Kili, is joining the team to help track down a runner on the Hawaiian island of Maui. This is not the only thing on their schedule, because after the hunt, Kili has to hurry off to his college graduation ceremony!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog discovers today's prey is a notorious ladies man, he knows just how to lure him in. The trap includes a suggestive phone call, a motel rendezvous, and a crew of bounty hunters waiting in the next room ready to break up the party!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge, the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook! A word to the wise for those on the run-post at your own peril, the Dog is watching!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestant will fire a starter's pistol and run from an attack dog. The contestants will lie in a pit made up of faux rocks and burlap. A 6 and a half inch wide beam is suspended over 100 feet in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestant stands on top of a moving semi truck jump and leaps. Approximately 300,000 superworms will be placed into the case with the contestants. Each contestant will be holding a paint ball gun and harnessed to a reverse bungee line.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Each contestant will be asked to eat two boiled buffalo testicles in 4 minutes. Each contestant will be harnessed and raised by crane. Each contestant will sit in the front seat of a car as the car is lowered by crane to the same depth of water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Each contestant will be dragged behind a horse. Contestant will enter a elevator shaft and will be covered by approximately 400 rats. One at a time each contestant will sit in the front seat of a car as the car is raised by crane over 100 feet in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Each contestant will climb a one hundred and ten foot tower. Each contestant will be asked to eat 6 worms in 4 minutes. Each contestant will have to find their way through an underground tunnel.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will swim under the boat collecting glow sticks along the way. Contestant will throw a dart and the score that they hit, the number of crickets the they will have to eat. Contestant will be harnessed and raised by a crane.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Each contestant will climb a 35 foot power pole, they must stand on top. Contestant will select a fortune cookie, each fortune is inscribed with a different pig part. The contestant stands on a skid at the back of a semi-truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will pull themselves into the belly of the helicopter. The number of pins left standing represents the number of live beetles that each contestant will have to eat. The contestant has to climb on a rope that is over a hundred feet in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Clip show of the greatest moments from Season 1

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant walks the wing of a bi-plane in flight. We fill a plexiglass basin with water, plums, ribbon and garter snakes, and one big albino snake. To jump a car off a two level parking structure with the furthest distance.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants must ride a bull for eight seconds. Each contestant eats poached cow's brain, served cold. To go the furthest distance after being ratcheted up and rope swinging down.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To jump from one moving boat to another. Climb into fishing boat tank filled with dead squid and retrieve weights from the bottom. Contestants shimmy out on a flag pole that is approximately 20 feet from the building, free the flag and shimmy back.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Players climb out over the skid and underneath the helicopter. Contestants shoot at target, determining the number of boiled pig rectums they will have to eat. The contestant must navigate around the ledge of a tall building.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace. Even though foul play is suspected, the leads don't pan out and the trail turns cold. Twenty years would pass before police are able to link a clump of hair discovered in an isolated area with the missing woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this international case of extortion, murder and stolen identities, scam-artist Albert J. Walker assumes the identity of co-worker Ronald Platt. Platt later turns up dead in an ocean with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Genell Plude is found dead in her bathroom, the scene points to suicide. But a coroner's inquest and a unique application of forensic science give investigators a different explanation for her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Prompted by news of a flight attendant's brutal murder, the son of a previous victim contacts police. Both murders have similar MOs, and biological evidence proves that these were serial killings.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Chip Jackson of MGM asks Ricky to perform at a party but he refuses in favor of a deep-sea fishing retreat. Lucy has a better idea - she tells Mr. Jackson that Ricky would be glad to appear.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky makes a little money by selling his car, he forgets to tell his New York neighbors who drove out with him to Hollywood that he will buy their return train tickets.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy, unaccustomed to train travel, is sure her trip to New York will be filled with intrigue and romance. When she hears that a jewel thief is on board, she sees herself as the possible heroine of the situation despite Ricky's admonitions to leave.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: On their return from Hollywood, Lucy has her hands full with Ricky when he is hailed as a major celebrity. The Ricardos' neighbors join for a grand homecoming celebration and block party in Ricky's honor when the Ricardos and Mertze return together.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Ricardo's new fame leads to an invitation to appear on a television interview program. The live interview is to take place in their home and Ricky's new agent wants them to move to a more posh apartment.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky cannot help Fred out by performing at his lodge show because he is already booked for a radio show that day. Lucy volunteers to help out so she and Fred whip up a Western act. Ricky discovers it's a rodeo show that he's booked for, not a radio show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky finds Lucy exhausted after a trying day with little Ricky and insists it is time their son started nursery school. Lucy's protests are overridden and Ricky takes young Ricky to nursery school, but the baby comes down with tonsillitis.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is offered a European booking that is too important to refuse but he can't afford to take Lucy with him. Lucy is furious at the prospect of being left behind, and when Ricky wants to take Fred Mertz along as the tour manager, Ethel too, is incensed.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is unable to produce her birth certificate to get a passport for the Ricardos' and Mertzes' European jaunt. She calls her hometown for the birth certificate but discovers that none exists for her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred's fear of becoming seasick threatens the Mertzes' and Ricardos' plans for Ricky's European band tour. They are all booked on the ocean liner Constitution for the trans-Atlantic voyage.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are on the deck of the Constitution, ready to set sail for Europe when Lucy rushes down the gangplank for one last goodbye to Little Ricky who will be in her mother's care while she is away.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy anticipates a 2nd honeymoon with Ricky on their boat trip to Europe, but Ricky's band duties keep him too busy. Lucy happily looks forward to romantic evenings and daytime deck games on board the ship as the Ricardos and the Mertzes sail for Europe.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is thrilled at being in London, and most of all wants to see the Queen. She misses the Queen at Buckingham Palace where she and Ethel try to make the guard smile.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is jealous after Ricky dances with Angela Randall, an up-and-coming British actress. She gets Ricky away from her by going to the country estate of Sir Clive Richardson, a prominent English film producer, for a fox hunt he is hosting.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes prepare to leave London for Paris, Lucy realizes that they will not have time to visit her ancestral land of Scotland. She was looking forward to seeking out members of the McGillicuddy clan, her distant relatives.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Equipped with an English-French dictionary, Lucy sets out to explore Paris and discover an artist whose paintings will become very valuable – she knows she has "the eye."

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes, sightseeing in Paris, are sitting at a sidewalk cafe that Charles Boyer is known to frequent. Lucy thinks she has spotted Boyer and turns to jelly, but Ricky convinces her it's a case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy goes on a hunger strike in order to get Ricky to buy an expensive dress from a famous French designer. He finally gives in but returns the dress when he discovers that Ethel smuggled her food while on the strike.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred, managing Ricky's band while on European tour, routes the musicians to Locarno instead of Lucerne. Ricky is distraught and Lucy suggests a hike in the Alps with the Mertzes to take his mind off his problems.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred Mertz, managing Ricky's European band tour, is very concerned over the expense incurred when he misrouted Ricky's band so he books second-class train passage for the overnight trip to Florence and a fourth-class hotel for their stay.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are on a train for Rome when Lucy is 'discovered' by an Italian film director who offers her a role in his new picture, "Bitter Grapes".

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are leaving Genoa for Nice when Lucy decides they should all go by bicycle because they can't see enough of the countries from the train. Ricky and the Mertzes agree under protest and after an exhausting day of pedaling.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is working in Monte Carlo, but Fred goofed and bargained for too little money for the engagement. Lucy and Ethel go to the casino to watch, but when Lucy finds a chip that someone dropped and replaces it on the table, it wins and continues to do so.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes need to return to the United States by plane instead of ship creating problems for Lucy who has bought, among other souvenirs, a 30-pound cheese.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is opening a new night spot, the Club Babalu, and wants Bob Hope to appear at the grand opening. Lucy fears Hope won't because of her widespread reputation for causing chaos, and wants to reassure him that this time she's butting out.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Although they both agree not to try and influence Little Ricky's future, Lucy buys a toy doctor kit and Ricky gives him a drum set. Their son takes to the drums and begins to play it non-stop for days.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Orson Welles is scheduled to perform for a benefit in Ricky's club. Ricky is worried that Lucy will foul things up if she is around so he decides to send her off to Florida.

programme.title: Mike Hammer, Private Eye
programme.desc: A janitor named Andy is embroiled in a murderous plot that leaves a stockbroker dead; when Andy finds the body and incriminates himself, Hammer is the only person that can clear his name.

programme.title: Mike Hammer, Private Eye
programme.desc: Hammers' efforts to prove that a crooked cop has sold out to the mob leave him in a perilous situation.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: The NCIS team works with Hetty's former Vietnam War colleagues, A.J. Chegwidden, Sterling Bridges and Charles Langston, on a gold heist investigation.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: When Sam's wife, Michelle, is taken from her home, the kidnappers demand that Sam's arch nemesis, Tahir Khaled, be released from prison in exchange for Michelle's whereabouts.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Sam Hanna goes rogue from the NCIS team in an attempt to stop Tahir Khaled from ever targeting his family again.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: When Hetty turns in retirement papers and disappears, Shay Mosley comes to Los Angeles to oversee the team and makes staffing changes; Sam insists that Callen find a new partner.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: When the daughter of a notorious counterfeiter arrives in Los Angeles, Sam goes under cover as a financier; Callen partners with Anna to track the family's latest scheme.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: A temporary chief fills in for Boden, who is forced to take some time off for personal reasons; Lt. Severide deals with an unwelcome addition to the squad; Brett becomes close to a girl she previously rescued; Casey starts seeing a new woman.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Severide steps in when Chief Pridgen tries to shift blame for a tactical error onto Casey; Mouch learns he fathered a child through a sperm donation; Brett and Cruz take Dawson on a double date.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Severide talks to Chief Boden for an old friend who needs a second chance with the fire department; Mills endeavors to regain his active status; Brett and Dawson decide they need a night out.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Herrmann tries to rescue a toddler from a structure fire; Mills discovers unexpected news; Brett and Cruz's relationship reaches a critical juncture; Otis is surprised by some feelings that develop.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Members of Firehouse 51 transport victims of a gas leak to nearby Chicago Med; an armed patient claiming to be carrying a deadly airborne disease forces Chicago Med into lockdown.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Mills works to save the life of a driver injured in a car wreck; Casey harbors doubts about Jack Nesbitt; Hermann, Otis, Cruz and Chaplain Orlovsky ready their team for the peewee hockey championship.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: An apartment fire with connections to a rape and attempted murder leads to a joint investigation with the CPD and Sgt. Benson of the NYPD's Special Victims Unit; Dawson risks her life during a call.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The judges unveil a new twist and bring in heavy-hitting veterans Joey Hamilton and Ryan Ashley to coach the teams, whose black-and-gray shading skills are put to the test.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Two-time veterans Bubba Irwin and Sarah Miller return to coach the men's and women's teams, and the artists showcase their knack for legibility by inking surrealistic tattoos.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Cam's arrogant behavior continues to irritate his team members during a color contrast challenge, and the gang bands together to sabotage Cam's standing in the competition.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: It's every man and woman for themselves when the artists tattoo any design in any style before a blind critique from the judges.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: In a test of consistency, the teams must engrave full suits of armor, then a cross-stitch style elimination tattoo throws all the artists for a loop.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The artists go head-to-head in a test of technical application, and the losers fight for their survival in an elimination tattoo challenge dictated by the victors.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The artists think outside the box as they show their understanding of color theory, then get a crash course in new school style from their coaches Jime Litwalk and Kelly Doty.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Composition must be perfect as the remaining competitors draw freehand tattoos on their canvases, and coaches James Vaughn and Megan Jean Morris offer the artists advice.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Every decision counts as the artists choose someone else's tattoo design and make it their own in a true test of adaptability.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: As the women's team plots to dismantle the men's team, the judges unveil a combination of detail design and cover-up challenges that are helmed by two domineering coaches.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: With only seven competitors remaining, the canvases hold all the power as the artists are challenged to out-market their rivals and work outside their creative comfort zones.

programme.title: Ink Master
